query: SELECT DISTINCT slot FROM game_equipment_catalog; SELECT equip_id, name, slot, tier, rarity, base_stats FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE equip_id IN ('E_W001','E_W003','E_W004','E_W005','E_E001','E_F031','E_M033','E_Wt001');
